mapper.select: SELECT * FROM accessory WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM accessory WHERE deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR spec LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accessory WHERE deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR spec LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
